title: Franky Resists CP9
description: Sanji works his way through the Sea Train, turning the rescue mission into a fight inside enemy territory.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Paulie, Spandam. Sanji works his way through the Sea Train, turning the rescue mission into a fight inside enemy territory.

dialogue.text: JE... Jerry-san, the enemy's behind... GAH!!!
